name: Branch Pipe & Nozzle
shortDescription: Gunmetal branch with interchangeable jet and spray nozzles.
longDescription: The branch pipe converts hose flow into a directed jet or spray pattern. Supplied in gunmetal or aluminium with an instantaneous inlet coupling to match standard 63 mm hose, and interchangeable nozzle tips so a single branch covers both jet reach and spray cooling duties.

images.alt: Branch Pipe & Nozzle supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
